title: Fixes and tests `Field(u::Field; indices)` and `Field(u::AbstractOperation; indices)`
Bug in vertical WENO topological conditional flux
fix the show for nonhydrostatic model

body:
This PR implements a closure that's similar in spirit to [Pacanowski-Philander](https://journals.ametsoc.org/view/journals/phoc/11/11/1520-0485_1981_011_1443_povmin_2_0_co_2.xml) but should also work for convective mixing.

In short, there are two mixing coefficients: a viscosity for momentum and a diffusivity for tracers. They both have the form

```julia
κ = κ₀ * step_down(Ri, Ri₀, Riᵟ)
```

where ` κ₀` is the diffusivity when the buoyancy gradient is negative and there's no shear (ie, convection), and `Ri` is the Richardson number. `step_down` is a function that's `1` for `Ri < Ri₀`, `0` for `Ri > Ri₀ + Riᵟ`, and linearly varying between `1` and `0` otherwise.

Another way to view this closure is as a generalization of convective adjustment to cases with shear.

This closure has 6 parameters, 3 each for viscosity and diffusivity.

I'd like to calibrate parameters to the LESbrary before merging, so this PR is just a draft for now.
title: Implements RiBasedVerticalDiffusivity

body:
Before this PR:

```julia
julia> using Oceananigans

julia> NamedTuple()
Error showing value of type NamedTuple{(), Tuple{}}:
ERROR: ArgumentError: collection must be non-empty
```

After this PR:

```julia
julia> using Oceananigans
[ Info: Precompiling Oceananigans [9e8cae18-63c1-5223-a75c-80ca9d6e9a09]
[ Info: Oceananigans will use 8 threads

julia> NamedTuple()
NamedTuple()
```

you'd think this stuff would be easy.

Closes #2398
title: Fancy `show` for `NamedTuple` of `Field` without being a type pirate
